# The Screen Team LLC

The Screen Team LLC is a screen repair and enclosure company serving the Tampa Bay Area, FL. Owner Chris Westcott handles estimates and field work directly — no call centers, no subcontractors, no runaround.

## Business Details

- **Company:** The Screen Team LLC
- **Owner/Operator:** Chris Westcott
- **Phone:** (727) 386-6562
- **Email:** chris@screenteamllc.com
- **Website:** https://screenteamllc.com
- **Hours:** Monday–Saturday, 7:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- **Free estimates:** Yes

## Service Area

Pasco, Pinellas, and Hillsborough County, Florida:
- New Port Richey, FL
- Port Richey, FL
- St. Petersburg, FL
- Clearwater, FL
- Largo, FL
- Palm Harbor, FL
- Safety Harbor, FL
- Dunedin, FL
- Oldsmar, FL
- Tarpon Springs, FL
- Seminole, FL
- Tampa, FL

## Services

### Rescreens
Replacement of screen mesh on pool cages, lanais, porches, patio enclosures, and outdoor rooms. Old screening is removed and fresh material is re-splined into existing aluminum frames. Partial panel replacement available when only sections are damaged. Most jobs completed in a single day.
Page: https://screenteamllc.com/rescreens.html

### Pool Enclosures
Pool cage and pool enclosure rescreening throughout Tampa Bay. Standard fiberglass, aluminum, and pet-resistant mesh options available. Repairs performed on storm, wildlife, or age-related damage.
Page: https://screenteamllc.com/pool-enclosures.html

### Screen Lanais
Screen lanai panel repair and full rescreen. Includes re-splining loose or popped panels. Pet-resistant and no-see-um mesh available as upgrades.
Page: https://screenteamllc.com/screen-lanais.html

### Window Screens
Custom-fit window screen frames and mesh for standard and non-standard openings. Torn, warped, or damaged screens replaced. Frame repair or replacement available.
Page: https://screenteamllc.com/window-screens.html

### Garage Screens
Panel-style and retractable garage screen systems for single and double-car garages. Allows airflow while keeping bugs and debris out.
Page: https://screenteamllc.com/garage-screens.html

### Gutter Work
Gutter repair and gutter-related exterior services, often combined with screen and enclosure jobs. Contact Chris to describe the situation.
Page: https://screenteamllc.com/gutter-work.html

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: How do I get an estimate?**
A: Call or text Chris at (727) 386-6562, or fill out the form at https://screenteamllc.com/contact.html. Chris reviews the job and gives a clear quote before work begins.

**Q: How long does a rescreen take?**
A: Most residential rescreens are completed in a single day. Larger pool cages or multi-section enclosures may take two days.

**Q: Can you replace just a few damaged panels, or does the whole thing need to be rescreened?**
A: Partial rescreens are available. Only what needs to be replaced gets replaced.

**Q: What screen material do you use for pool cages in Florida?**
A: Standard fiberglass for most applications. Aluminum and pet-resistant mesh are available as upgrades. No-see-um screen is also available for finer filtration.

**Q: Does The Screen Team offer a workmanship guarantee?**
A: Yes. If something isn't right after the job is done, call Chris and it will be corrected.

**Q: How do I know if my frame is good enough to rescreen instead of replace?**
A: If the aluminum framing is straight, posts are stable, and there's no major structural damage, a rescreen is usually the right move. Chris will give an honest assessment on-site.

**Q: Do you serve commercial properties?**
A: Contact Chris to discuss. The primary focus is residential pool cages, lanais, porches, and enclosures.
